history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a mobile video-viewing screen with an anime-style paused frame at the top and a comments section below.

In the main video area, there is an anime-style close-up of a character with dark spiky hair and large blue eyes, facing forward. A circular play button appears in the center of the video. Small white countdown numbers “10” appear near the left and right sides of the video, and there are overlay controls including a left and right skip icon on either side. Below the video frame, a timeline shows a time label “00:05 / 23:35” and additional icons, with “480p” and “1x” shown near the lower right of the video area. A row of episode or chapter tabs appears near the bottom of the video area, with visible numbers “101”, “102”, “103”, “104”, “105”, and “106”, and the current selection appears to be “102”. 

Below the video, there is a message in Indonesian that reads: “Jangan lupa untuk membuat komentar yang sopan dan santun dan mengikuti Aturan Komunitas kami”. Under that, a large text label shows “726 Comments”. Beneath it are three interface buttons: “Top Comment”, “Terbaru”, and a button labeled “Atur” with an icon. There is a comment input area showing the placeholder text “Tambahkan komentar...”, along with a send arrow-like icon. A visible comment includes a name followed by a check mark and the time “9 jam lalu”, and includes badges or labels reading “GFR” and “LvL. 527” and “#10840875”. The comment text includes “Karena sedang baik”. A blue promotional bar contains text and a button; it reads “1 Hari Premium” and “Tersisa 17 dari 25”, and the button says “Klaim”. Below that, there is “3 Replies”. Another visible comment shows a name with a check mark and “4 hari lalu”, includes a red label “ANTI”, a green label “LvL. 25.016”, and “#2039600”, and the comment text reads “LESGOO JOIN CLAN ANTI, DISINI NO RULES DAN”.

The setting is entirely a screen capture of a video player and comments UI on a mobile device, with dark-themed backgrounds and white text overlays. The lighting is entirely from the on-screen UI; the anime image itself is in grayscale-blue tones with the character’s blue eyes standing out.

No important visible text detected.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
